title: Flight duration and firework danger indicator
description: Displays flight duration and firework danger
body:
# Flight duration and firework danger indicator
**This resource pack allows you to see the flight range and explosive danger of fireworks.**

---
**required [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

---
